headline: Is M&T Bank (MTB) Still Attractive After Recent Regional Banking Sector Scrutiny?
summary: If you are wondering whether M&T Bank at around US$204.90 is still a solid entry or if the easy value has already been taken, this article breaks down what the current price might really mean for you. The stock is roughly flat year to date with a 0.4% return. It has delivered 12.4% over the past year and 86.2% over three years. These figures can hint at shifting views on its long term prospects and risk profile. Recent attention around M&T Bank has focused on how investors see large regional...
